agentic.label: Agent loops / coding (Reddit consensus)
agentic.description: Reliable tool use beats flashy prose. Qwen spine + small Gemma lookup is the M-tier pattern.

agentic_moe.label: Agentic MoE (8 GB+ with RAM offload)
agentic_moe.description: Qwen3.5 35B-A3B is the most cited MoE for coding/agents on one GPU + system RAM.

creative.label: Creative writing / RP (different stack)
creative.description: Megathread favors large Gemma 4 for prose — not the same ladder as agent coding.

S.note: Efficiency-tier daily driver; with QAT int4 (~5 GB) use configure(quant='qat'). Prefer Unsloth UD-Q4_K_XL over naive Google Q4_0 for llama.cpp.
Small general Q&A when Gemma unavailable.

M.note: Most cited small model; QAT int4 pull (~5 GB runtime) unlocks bigger Gemma tiers on same VRAM.

L.note: Still used as fast tier even on large rigs.

M.note: Default mid tier — summarise, compare, outline.
Daily driver for many 3090 users; thinking off for speed.
Works but community notes Gemma can be terse unless prompted hard.

L.note: Hybrid attention; strong through long agent context.
Dense mid-large without MoE parsing pain.

M.note: Complex tier in mixed 12 GB stacks.
MoE top tier when VRAM allows partial GPU load.
Single-GPU complex step on 24 GB class cards.

L.note: Cited for agentic tool use at XL-ish RAM.

M.note: Reddit daily driver on 3090 — pull when Ollama ships tag; use qwen3:14b meanwhile.
MoE coding agent — pull when available; qwen3:30b-a3b is close.
QAT int4 ~15 GB — fits 16 GB cards; added to stack when quant=qat.
Fast MoE coding; some report agent crashes on long runs.

S.note: Surprise winner on 8 GB + large system RAM.

M.note: Reasoning tier in split-stack 12 GB preset.

L.note: Separate reasoning slot in large mixed stacks.
Cited for long-context agent memory (slow locally).

M.note: Megathread favorite for prose and context coherence.
MoE variant; fast but different from agent ladder.

L.note: Long-context character work at XL RAM.
